payload.input_str: {'sql': "SELECT s.Fname FROM Student s JOIN Has_Pet hp1 ON s.StuID = hp1.StuID JOIN Pets p1 ON hp1.PetID = p1.PetID JOIN Has_Pet hp2 ON s.StuID = hp2.StuID JOIN Pets p2 ON hp2.PetID = p2.PetID WHERE p1.PetType = 'dog' AND p2.PetType = 'cat';"}
